periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 87, with temperatures falling to around 84 in the afternoon. South southeast wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 75. Southwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.
